title: Nakia
content:
{{CharHub|Nakia|Nakia}} {{Character |image = Black Panther Wakanda Forever poster 025 Textless.jpg |real name = Nakia |alias = {{Alias |undercover = Maria Aldana{{Ref|BPWF}}}} |species = [[Human]] |citizenship = {{Citizenship|WKD}}
{{Citizenship|HAT}} |gender = Female |snapped = No{{Ref|BPWF}} |title = Head of the Social Outreach Department (formerly)
Headmistress |affiliation = [[River Tribe]]
[[War Dogs]] (formerly)
[[Wakandan International Outreach Centre]] (formerly) |movie = ''[[Black Panther (film)|Black Panther]]''
''[[Black Panther: Wakanda Forever]]'' |docuseries = ''[[Legends]]''
*''[[Wakanda's War Dogs]]'' |book = {{Infobox List|''[[Captain Marvel: What Makes A Hero]]''
{{Collapse|''[[The Wakanda Files: A Technological Exploration of the Avengers and Beyond]]'' (mentioned)}}}} |actor = [[Lupita Nyong'o]]
[[Lidya Jewett]] (young) |status = Alive}} {{Quote|I've seen too many in need just to turn a blind eye. I can't be happy here knowing that there's people out there who have nothing.|Nakia to [[T'Challa]]|Black Panther (film)}} '''Nakia''' is a former member of the [[War Dogs]] and [[T'Challa]]'s lover, who was often sent on missions around the world, witnessing the hardships experienced by many people and growing the belief that [[Wakanda]] should actively help them. She was pulled out of an assignment to attend the [[Coronation of T'Challa]] and took part in a mission in order to [[Arrest of Ulysses Klaue|arrest]] the criminal [[Ulysses Klaue]]. Following their failure to apprehend him, Nakia exiled herself when [[Erik Killmonger]] took the throne of Wakanda. She reunited with T'Challa in [[Jabari Land]] and assisted him in reclaiming the throne from Killmonger. When T'Challa decided to open Wakanda to the rest of the world, Nakia would oversee the humanitarian policy of Wakanda. In secret, Nakia and T'Challa had a child, [[T'Challa II|Toussaint]], who Nakia raised in [[Haiti]] after the [[Snap]]. In [[2025]], one year after the death of T'Challa, Queen [[Ramonda]] had visited Nakia and recruited her into rescuing [[Shuri]] from the clutches of the [[Talokanil]], an underwater civilization on the verge of waring with the Wakandans. In the process of the rescue, Nakia saved Shuri while inadverantly sparking the [[Talokanil-Wakandan War]], where Ramonda would be [[Attack on Birnin Zana|killed]] by the Talokanil leader [[Namor]]. Nakia then agreed to join Shuri and Wakanda in their campaign to fight [[Talokan]] in a [[Ambush on the Talokanil|final confrontation]], which eventually ended in a truce between the two nations. After the war, Nakia invited Shuri to Haiti and introduced her to Toussaint as her nephew. ==Biography== ===Early Life=== ====Dating T'Challa==== Nakia had developed a close bond with [[T'Challa]] and the two dated for a short while.{{Ref|BP}} ====Undercover Work==== While [[T'Challa]] learned to become King of [[Wakanda]] and the ways of the royal family, Nakia joined the [[War Dogs]]. During a mission in [[South Korea]], she was involved in a confrontation with ivory smugglers. She was later given an undercover assignment in [[Nigeria]] where she pretended to be a Nigerian woman as she observed the trafficking going on in the country.{{Ref|BP}} ===T'Challa's Rule=== ====[[Rescue of Nakia]]==== [[File:BP Nakia (Ruined Mission).png|{{AltFloat}}|Nakia tells [[T'Challa]] that her mission is ruined]] {{Quote|Why are you here? You ruined my mission.|Nakia to [[T'Challa|Black Panther]]|Black Panther (film)}} Two years later, Nakia was still on her undercover mission. She traveled in a truck with several other captives until the truck line was suddenly stopped. As the captors engaged in defense position, Nakia sneaked out of the truck. While [[T'Challa|Black Panther]] suddenly attacked the traffickers, Nakia picked up a machine gun and assisted him in the fact. She then stopped Black Panther as he moved forward to the last soldier, claiming that he was a young boy who had been forced to carry a weapon. [[File:Tumblr p69ixxAsDo1w8xetso3 1280.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Nakia comforts [[T'Challa|Black Panther]]]] One last soldier took another woman hostage in front of Nakia and Black Panther, only to be taken down by [[Okoye]]. With the attack being over, Nakia blamed Black Panther for having sabotaged her cover. However, Black Panther informed her that [[T'Chaka]] had died and that he wanted her to attend his [[Coronation of T'Challa|incoronation]]. Therefore, Nakia told the captives to go home and agreed to return to [[Wakanda]]. During the journey, Nakia comforted T'Challa over the loss of his father.{{Ref|BP}} ====[[Coronation of T'Challa]]==== [[File:River Tribe.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nakia performs the [[River Tribe]]'s ritual dance]] Upon arriving in [[Birnin Zana]], Nakia left with [[Ayo]] who escorted her back to the [[River Tribe]] province to prepare for the impending [[Coronation of T'Challa]]. Nakia then went onto the River Tribe's boat during the ceremony, performing the ritual dances along with the other members of her tribe. Later, Nakia attended the coronation ceremony and was surprised when [[M'Baku]] and the [[Jabari Tribe]] arrived and declared that they would challenge [[T'Challa]] for the throne. [[File:Black Panther (film) 123.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Nakia attends the [[Coronation of T'Challa]]]] [[T'Challa]] accepted the challenge, and Nakia then attended the duel between T'Challa and [[M'Baku]], expressing distress when M'Baku stabbed T'Challa in the shoulder with his knobkerrie. However, T'Challa eventually triumphed over M'Baku, much to Nakia's joy who happily cheered her new King. Therefore, T'Challa was celebrated by the people of [[Wakanda]] as he was officially crowned the King of Wakanda.{{Ref|BP}} ====Spending Time with T'Challa==== [[File:T'Challa & Nakia.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nakia conversing with [[T'Challa]]]] Later, Nakia took a walk with T'Challa in the Birnin Zana. When T'Challa asked her to remain in [[Wakanda]], Nakia insisted that she wanted to return into a mission to help other people outside her country. Indeed, Nakia thought that Wakanda should do more towards people in need instead of keeping hiding from the world, although T'Challa did not share her views. When T'Challa noticed that her stubbornness would keep her from being a great Queen, Nakia replied that this was what would make her a great Queen, making her imply that she thought about it.{{Ref|BP}} ====[[Arrest of Ulysses Klaue]]==== [[File:Black Panther (film) 150.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Nakia meets with [[Sophia (Busan)|Sophia]]]] Nakia was later recruited for a mission along with [[T'Challa|Black Panther]] and [[Okoye]] to arrest the criminal [[Ulysses Klaue]]. They journeyed to [[Busan]], [[South Korea]], where Nakia reached her contact [[Sophia (Busan)|Sophia]], who had information regarding the deal Klaue was about to make in the [[Jagalchi Market Casino]]. They entered the casino and decided to split up to cover more area. Nakia sat at the bar and soon spotted three Americans, suspecting them to work with Klaue's buyer. [[File:BP Teaser Trailer 31.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nakia looks for the American [[Everett Ross|buyer]]]] While T'Challa discovered that [[CIA]] operative [[Everett Ross]] was the buyer, Klaue arrived in the casino with more bodyguards, prompting Nakia to stand up and be ready for action. As more Americans kept coming, Nakia and the others out figured out that this was an ambush meant for them. When bodyguards eventually identified Okoye as a target, a violent gunfight erupted in the casino. Nakia took down several of Klaue's bodyguards before leaving the casino with Okoye. [[File:Okoye-Nakia-ThePeopleAreWatching.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Nakia witnesses the [[Arrest of Ulysses Klaue|Arrest]] of [[Ulysses Klaue]]]] Both Nakia and Okoye engaged in the hot pursuit in the streets of Busan, chasing Klaue in his SUV. They successfully followed him for a while, nearly catching up with him, but in the end, Klaue used his [[Ulysses Klaue's Prosthetic Arm|prosthetic hand]]'s cannon to blast their car, leaving them behind while he escaped. Nakia and Okoye were then picked up by [[CIA]] Agent [[Everett Ross]], who took them to where Black Panther had ultimately caught Klaue. Nakia begged him not to execute Klaue as they were being watched by numerous witnesses.{{Ref|BP}} ====Interrogating Ulysses Klaue==== [[File:BP Teaser Trailer 28.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nakia witnesses [[Ulysses Klaue]]'s interrogation]] Nakia joined the [[CIA South Korean Black Site]] along with [[T'Challa|Black Panther]] and [[Okoye]]. However, while [[Ulysses Klaue]] was being interrogated, Nakia figured out that something was not right outside the CIA facility. Indeed, a disguised [[Erik Killmonger]] had arrived to release Klaue. Killmonger began shooting in the facility and [[Everett Ross]] jumped in front of Nakia, taking a bullet for her. Nakia then agreed with Black Panther upon bringing Ross to [[Wakanda]] to heal him.{{Ref|BP}} ====Erik Killmonger's Arrival==== [[File:Black Panther OCT17 Trailer 21.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nakia comforts [[T'Challa]]]] Back in [[Wakanda]], Nakia took some time alone with [[T'Challa]], who had learned the truth about his uncle [[N'Jobu]] who had betrayed Wakanda and had been killed by T'Challa's father [[T'Chaka]]. Nakia comforted T'Challa, stating that he was not responsible for his father's mistakes and that he had to choose what kind of King he would be. Their conversation was however interrupted as [[Shuri]] called T'Challa and asked him to come back to her [[Shuri's Lab|lab]], along with [[Everett Ross]], who was recovering from his gunshot wound. [[File:TChalla-Nakia-LookingAtKillmongersRecord.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nakia reads [[Erik Killmonger]]'s record]] At Shuri's Lab, the two uncovered that the man from earlier was [[Erik Killmonger]], whose real name was Erik Stevens, a former Navy Seal and a member of a [[CIA]] black ops assassination squad. Indeed, Killmonger had returned to Wakanda with the corpse of [[Ulysses Klaue]] as a gift. Nakia listened to [[Everett Ross]]' presentation about Killmonger, all the while exchanging concerned looks with T'Challa.{{Ref|BP}} ====[[Coronation of Erik Killmonger]]==== [[File:Female-Warriors-Black-Panther.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Nakia attends the [[Coronation of Erik Killmonger|duel]] between [[Erik Killmonger]] and [[T'Challa]]]] Later, Nakia attended the [[Coronation of Erik Killmonger|duel]] between [[Erik Killmonger]] and [[T'Challa]]. When [[Okoye]] asked her where [[Everett Ross]] was, Nakia replied that she had locked him up. Nakia then watched the fight and despite her support, T'Challa was defeated and [[Zuri]] was murdered by Killmonger. Nakia watched in horror as Killmonger took T'Challa and threw him over the waterfall, leaving him for dead. Knowing that they were in danger as of now, Nakia took Shuri and [[Ramonda]] away for safety.{{Ref|BP}} ====Exile from Wakanda==== [[File:BP - Nakia Steals Heart-Shaped Herb.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nakia steals a [[Heart-Shaped Herb]]]] {{Quote|I'm not a spy who can come and go as they so choose! I am loyal to that throne, no matter who sits upon it. What are you loyal to?"
"I loved [[T'Challa|him]]. I loved my [[Wakanda|country]], too."
"Then you serve your country."
"No. I save my country.|[[Okoye]] and Nakia|Black Panther (film)}} Nakia later met with [[Okoye]] and asked her to come with them and leave [[Birnin Zana]]. However, Okoye refused claiming that she was bound to serve whoever sat on the throne of [[Wakanda]]. Nakia replied that she loved Wakanda as much as Okoye did and that she would save it from Killmonger while Okoye would serve the new King. Nakia then went to find [[Everett Ross]]. She informed him of [[T'Challa]]'s demise and gave him clothes so he could escape with [[Shuri]], [[Ramonda]] and Nakia herself. [[File:BP EW 10.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Nakia, [[Shuri]], [[Ramonda]] and [[Everett Ross]] go into exile]] Before leaving the Birnin Zana, however, Nakia went to the [[City of the Dead]], where Killmonger was to undergo the ceremony where he would meet his ancestors on the [[Ancestral Plane]]. Nakia watched as Killmonger returned from his interdimensional journey and ordered all the [[Heart-Shaped Herb]] to be burnt down. Nakia managed to salvage one single herb before secretly leaving. She then reunited with Shuri, Ramonda and Ross and they made their way to [[Jabari Land]], where they intended to give the Herb to [[M'Baku]] so he could challenge Killmonger. [[File:BP - Nakia suggests Help From M'Baku.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nakia offers help and the [[Heart-Shaped Herb]] to [[M'Baku]]]] On the way, Ramonda questioned this plan and suggested that Nakia should take the herb herself, but she refused, as she was a spy with no army. They were captured by [[Jabari Tribe|Jabari]] warriors who brought them to M'Baku. Nakia explained to M'Baku that they had come to offer him the Heart-Shaped Herb so he could help them overthrow Killmonger. However, instead of taking it, M'Baku took Nakia and the others with them and revealed the truth: T'Challa was alive and had been secretly kept by the Jabari Tribe. [[File:BP - Heart-Shaped Herb (At Hand).png|{{AltFloat}}|Nakia presents the [[Heart-Shaped Herb]]]] Nakia gave the Heart-Shaped Herb to Ramonda, who crushed it into the drink which would restore the powers of the [[:Category:Black Panthers|Black Panther]]. Thanks to that, T'Challa was revived, much to Nakia's joy. They returned to the Jabari throne room, where Nakia explained the situation in Wakanda and swore to fight at T'Challa's side against Killmonger.{{Ref|BP}}{{Clear}} ====[[Battle of Mount Bashenga]]==== [[File:BP Teaser Trailer 56.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nakia and [[Shuri]] join the battle]] {{Quote|Hey, Nakia, take that."
"I'm not a [[Dora Milaje|Dora]]."
"Just put it on, it's armor!|[[Shuri]] and Nakia|Black Panther (film)}} Nakia, [[Shuri]] and [[Everett Ross]] sneaked into [[Shuri's Lab]] while [[T'Challa|Black Panther]] faced the [[Border Tribe]] who followed [[Erik Killmonger]]. Nakia then reclaimed advanced [[Circular Vibranium Blades]] and, on Shuri's request, wore a [[Dora Milaje]] armor. She then left the lab with Shuri, leaving Ross behind so he could take remote control of the [[Royal Talon Fighter]]. Nakia and Shuri joined the battlefield on [[Mount Bashenga]] and quickly confronted Killmonger as he had defeated [[Okoye]] and two other Doras. [[File:Black Panther (film) 128.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Nakia fights the [[Border Tribe]]]] Using her Circular Vibranium Blades, Nakia managed to disarm Killmonger, but he fought back and wounded her on the thigh with his [[Panther Habit]]'s claws. He then threw Nakia away before turning to Shuri. As Black Panther joined into the fight, Nakia was found by Shuri, and they decided to resume the fight against the Border Tribe alongside with the Dora Milaje. However, they were outnumbered and Nakia, Okoye, Shuri and [[Ayo]] found themselves cornered by the Border Tribe. [[File:BP Teaser Trailer 59.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nakia during the [[Battle of Mount Bashenga]]]] Nakia and the others were eventually saved by [[M'Baku]] and the [[Jabari Tribe]], who came into battle to fight for Black Panther. Thanks to these reinforcements, Nakia was able to defeat several members of the Border Tribe. In the end, the Border Tribe surrendered while Black Panther successfully defeated Killmonger.{{Ref|BP}} ====Helping the World==== [[File:BP Teaser Trailer 44.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nakia and [[T'Challa]] at [[Birnin Zana]]]] {{Quote|This will be the first [[Wakandan International Outreach Centre]]. Nakia will oversee the social outreach.|[[T'Challa]] to [[Shuri]]|Black Panther (film)}} In the aftermath of the [[Battle of Mount Bashenga]], Nakia was present in the throne room as [[T'Challa]] returned as the rightful King of [[Wakanda]]. She then took another walk with T'Challa in the streets of [[Birnin Zana]]. When T'Challa thanked her for having saved both himself and Wakanda, Nakia simply replied that she had done her duty and protected what she loved, prompting T'Challa to kiss her. Nakia kissed him back and T'Challa announced that he had found a way for her to fulfill her plans of providing the world with assistance. [[File:BP - Nakia (Press Conference).png|{{AltFloat}}|Nakia attends the [[Vienna International Centre]]]] As T'Challa decided to create [[Wakandan International Outreach Centre]], Nakia was appointed a head of the social outreach department.{{Ref|BP}} She then accompanied T'Challa to [[Vienna]] for a [[United Nations]] meeting during which T'Challa decided to open Wakanda to the world, following Nakia's advice.{{Ref|BP}} ===New Life=== ====Having A Son==== Sometime later, Nakia and [[T'Challa]] had a [[T'Challa II|son]] together and kept his existence a secret. Nakia abandoned her positions, leaving the [[War Dogs]], and made plans with T'Challa for her to move to [[Haiti]]. They decided to move there so their son wouldn't be pressured with the [[Golden Tribe]].{{Ref|BPWF}} ====[[Snap]]==== {{Quote|After [[Thanos]]' [[Battle of Wakanda|attack]] when you left without saying a word. It hurt."
"I regret not being there with all of you. It was not easy.|[[Okoye]] and Nakia|Black Panther: Wakanda Forever}} In [[2018]], Nakia, pregnant with her [[T'Challa II|son]], was kept away when the [[Battle of Wakanda|battle]] with aliens occurred. She and her son then survived the [[Snap]]. After learning that T'Challa and [[Shuri]] had disappeared, she and her son, without telling anyone, moved to [[Haiti]]. Making the move and grieving the losses wasn't an easy feat for her.{{Ref|BPWF}} ====Community Work==== She then gave birth to her son there. During the next five years, she bought a house for herself where she raised her son. She also took part in helping out at nearby orphanages, working as a headmistress.{{Ref|BPWF}} ====Contacted by T'Challa==== {{Quote|[[T'Challa|He]] did not want [[T'Challa II|us]] to go to the funeral, because he felt the time was not yet right. So we had our own ceremony for him here."
"Did my [[Ramonda|mother]] meet him?"
"She did.|Nakia to [[Black Panther|Shuri]]|Black Panther: Wakanda Forever}} In [[2023]], Nakia was contacted by [[T'Challa]] after he had been [[Blip|restored to life]] and was visited by him. In [[2024]], he told her about his illness and prepared her and their son for his subsequent death. He also told her that when he died, he wanted her to stay there and not attend his funeral. After he passed, Nakia held a little funeral at her [[Nakia's House|house]].{{Ref|BPWF}} ===[[Talokanil-Wakandan War|Wakanda-Talokan Conflict]]=== ====Reunion with Ramonda==== [[File:Black Panther II Trailer (34).png|{{AltFloat}}|Nakia reunites with [[Ramonda]]]] Nakia was living peacefully in [[Haiti]] when she was approached by [[Toussaint]] who had led [[Ramonda]] to her. Nakia talked to Ramonda about all that had happened in the past six years. Ramonda then told Nakia that [[Shuri]] had been taken and asked for her help. Nakia wanted Ramonda to distract [[Namor]] while she went in.{{Ref|BPWF}} ====Searching Mexico==== [[File:NakiaSpeaksSpanish.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nakia finds information on [[Namor]]]] {{Quote|Mi profesora menciono un estudio donde les dijiste a los investigadores que encontraste algo... Con [[Namor|alguien]] me crees."Translates from Spanish to: "''My professor mentioned a study where you told researchers that you encountered something... Someone unimaginable.''"
"Nada bueno salió de hablar con esos forasteros."Translates from Spanish to: "'' good came of speaking with those outsiders.''"
"Te lo ruego, por favor."Translates from Spanish to: "''I'm begging you.''"
"Váyase. Ahora."Translates from Spanish to: "''Leave now.''"
"Teene' xan u ts'o'ok in kaxtik.Translates from Yucatec Maya to: "''I've encountered him too.''"|Nakia and Mayan Elder|Black Panther: Wakanda Forever}} Nakia searched [[Mexico]] for any information on [[Namor]], trying to find his location. She approached a woman, posing as a student and she asked for information, but the woman did not want to speak to outsiders, telling Nakia to go. Nakia then spoke in Yucatec Mayan, telling her that she has seen him, too. The woman then told Nakia about Namor.{{Ref|BPWF}} ====Rescuing Shuri and Riri==== [[File:NakiaInNamor'sCave.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nakia points her gun at a [[Talokanil]]]] {{Quote|Queen Mother, I've found [[Shuri|her]] signal. It's coming from an [[Namor's Cenote|underwater cave]]. If she’s down there, I'm sure I'll encounter resistance. How would you like me to proceed?"
"Retrieve the princess by any means necessary.|Nakia and [[Ramonda]]|Black Panther: Wakanda Forever}} Nakia located the underwater nation of [[Talokan]] and used an underwater vehicle to travel into a [[Namor's Cenote|cave]]. She emerged in a cave without water and found [[Shuri]]. She pointed her [[Sonic Rifle|gun]] at a [[Talokanil]] that was holding Shuri by the throat. Nakia spoke in Xhosa, telling Shuri to move her left arm. Once she did, Nakia shot the Talokanil. Although Shuri wanted to help the woman, Nakia told her she was as good as dead. They hopped on her vehicle and made it to the surface where [[Ramonda]] reunited with Shuri, thanking Nakia.{{Ref|BPWF}} ====[[Attack on Birnin Zana]]==== [[File:Okoye hug.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nakia sharing a hug with [[Okoye]]]] {{Quote|[[T'Challa|He]] was king, and Black Panther to everyone, but to me he was everything. My T'Challa.|Nakia to [[Okoye]]|Black Panther: Wakanda Forever}} Nakia finally returned to [[Wakanda]] after six years. She talked with [[Okoye]] in the city about [[T'Challa]] and his death. Suddenly, water came rushing through the city. Okoye told her they were under attack. Nakia and Okoye used a [[Scarab Beetle|ship]] to rescue many civilians including [[Shuri]]. They then rushed to the [[Citadel]] where they found [[Ramonda]] and [[Riri Williams]] drowning. [[File:NakiaSeesRamondaDead.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nakia sees that [[Ramonda]] has drowned]] Nakia grabbed Williams and used [[Kimoyo Beads]] to try to resuscitate her. Following many attempts, Williams finally woke up, spitting and coughing out water. Nakia then ran over to Okoye, who was doing the same to Ramonda. Nakia connected her beads to Ramonda's and figured out it was too late for her. Nakia told Okoye to back off as it was too late, the queen was dead. Nakia stayed silent at the funeral as Shuri mourned.{{Ref|BPWF}} ====Helping Shuri==== [[File:NakiaArguesWithShuri.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nakia gets yelled at by [[Shuri]]]] {{Quote|Allow this [[Heart-Shaped Herb]] to give you the strength of the Black Panther and take you to the [[Ancestral Plane]].|Nakia to [[Shuri]]|Black Panther: Wakanda Forever}} Nakia met with the grieving [[Shuri]] in her [[Shuri's Lab|lab]]. Shuri was set on recreating the [[Heart-Shaped Herb]] so she could take [[Namor]] down. Nakia helped her recreate the herb along with [[Riri Williams]]. Nakia then set Shuri down and had her drink the substance. When Shuri woke up, she claimed not to feel any different. Angry that it did not work, she argued with Nakia before punching a mannequin, only for it to go flying. Realizing she did have strength, Nakia told Shuri to make a [[Panther Habit|suit]].{{Ref|BPWF}} ====Ceasefire==== [[File:NakiaWarnsShuri.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nakia giving her warning to [[Black Panther]]]] {{Quote|If we survive [[Ambush on the Talokanil|this]], I want you to know you have a [[Nakia's House|home]] with me in [[Haiti]]. Here. Take my hands. Breathe. Shuri, I want you to be honest with me. [[Erik Killmonger|Who]] did you see when you took the [[Heart-Shaped Herb|Herb]]? If you go to war for vengeance, it will not fill the hole left from [[Ramonda|her]] loss. It will only grow larger, and it will consume you."
"It already has.|Nakia and [[Shuri]]|Black Panther: Wakanda Forever}} Prior to luring the [[Talokanil]] to the ''[[Sea Leopard]]'', Nakia approached the new [[Black Panther]]. Nakia first told Shuri that she would always have a [[Nakia's House|home]] with her in [[Haiti]]. She then told Shuri to breathe, which she did. Nakia then asked Shuri [[Erik Killmonger|who]] she saw in the [[Ancestral Plane]]. Shuri backed off, refusing to say. Fearing the worst, Nakia told Shuri that killing out of vengeance would only make things worse, it will grow the hole in her heart until it consumed her. Shuri told Nakia that she was already consumed. [[File:Nakia & M'Baku.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nakia and [[M'Baku]] stand side-by-side]] On the ''Sea Leopard'', the Talokanil arrived, allowing the [[Wakanda]]ns to ambush. Nakia fought the Talokanil, but [[Namor]] threw an aircraft onto the ship. When Black Panther got Namor away, Nakia and [[M'Baku]] ordered the ship to retreat. However, the Talokanil [[Hydrobomb|bombed]] the bottom of the ship, making it nearly tipped over, sending many Wakandans into the deadly seas below. Nakia used her [[Circular Vibranium Blades]] in battle. Finally, Shuri and Namor returned from their own battle, having struck a truce. The fight ended with the Wakandans praising the Black Panther once again.{{Ref|BPWF}} ===Return to Haiti=== ====Introducing Her Son==== [[File:Toussaint & Nakia.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nakia and [[T'Challa II|Toussaint]] greeting [[Black Panther|Shuri]]]] {{Quote|[[T'Challa|We]] agreed it was better for [[T'Challa II|him]] to grow up [[Haiti|here]], away from the pressure of the throne.|Nakia to [[Black Panther|Shuri]]|Black Panther: Wakanda Forever}} Nakia then returned to [[Haiti]]. She and her [[T'Challa II|son]] joined [[Black Panther|Shuri]] on the beach next to her [[Nakia's House|house]], and introduced him to her as her and [[T'Challa]]'s child. [[File:Toussaint and Nakia BPWF.png|{{AltFloat}}|Nakia explaining to [[Black Panther|Shuri]]]] Nakia explained to Shuri that she and T'Challa had agreed it was better for him to grow up in Haiti, away from the pressure of being [[Wakanda]]'s king. She also revealed that he had prepared them for his death, and told them not to come to his funeral. Shuri then asked if her [[Ramonda|mother]] had met him before her passing, which Nakia confirmed.{{Ref|BPWF}} {{Clear}} ==Abilities== *'''Master Spy''': [[File:BP Nakia (News About T'Chaka).png|thumb|250px|Nakia going undercover as a captive]] Nakia is a member of the [[War Dogs]], [[Wakanda]]'s spy group. As such, she was able to flawlessly infiltrate a kidnapping. Her cover was only broken when [[T'Challa|Black Panther]] sought her out himself and ruined the mission. She can also scout out who the most dangerous men are. When T'Challa went to kill one of the kidnappers, Nakia stopped him and showed that it was just a kid. When [[Erik Killmonger]] became King, she was able to negotiate with [[M'Baku]] for protection. She then infiltrated the farm and stole a [[Heart-Shaped Herb]] for T'Challa. When trying to find [[Shuri]], Nakia was able to gain the trust of a [[Yucatán]] woman. {{Quote|The [[Sophia (Busan)|woman]] outside. What trouble was she referring to?"
"Ah... I got into a disagreement with some ivory traders. Made a bit of a mess.|[[T'Challa]] and Nakia|Black Panther (film)}} *'''Master Martial Artist''': [[File:Black Panther OCT17 Trailer 65.png|thumb|250px|Nakia fighting against [[Killmonger]]]] Nakia is highly skilled and formidable in hand-to-hand combat and martial arts. She took down multiple goons of [[Ulysses Klaue]]'s using different techniques and has held her own against [[Erik Killmonger]], even disarming him, while he was imbued with the power of the [[Heart-Shaped Herb]] and the [[Panther Habit|Golden Jaguar Habit]]. She is the top warrior in the [[River Tribe]] as she was standing next to the [[River Tribe Elder]] holding her weapons during the [[Coronation of T'Challa]]. *'''Chakram Mastery''': Nakia is has shown great skills using her [[Circular Vibranium Blades]] as chakrams, being able to continuously attack [[Erik Killmonger|Killmonger]] and later several [[Border Tribe]] members. She can both use these as projectiles and also as close-range weapons. She used these again while fighting [[Talokanil]]. *'''Expert Marksman''': Due to her War Dog training, Nakia is able to handle firearms with great proficiency, being able to gun down two of [[Ulysses Klaue]]’s men at the [[Arrest of Ulysses Klaue|casino fight]]. She was also able to accurately shoot down two [[Talokanil|Talokanils]] while rescuing [[Shuri]] and [[Riri Williams]]. *'''Multilingualism''': Nakia is fluent in her native Xhosa, as well as English, Korean, Spanish, Yucatec Maya and Haitian Creole. ==Equipment== ===Weapons=== *'''[[Circular Vibranium Blades]]''': Nakia's Circular Vibranium Blades are charged with some form of energy and are seen as being able to bounce back to her grip after throwing one at [[Erik Killmonger]]. It is unclear whether or not this is because of skill or technology though. She used the same weapon to fight several members of the [[Border Tribe]] and the [[Talokanil]]. *'''{{WPS|SIG Sauer P226#P226 Rail|SIG-Sauer P226R}}''': Nakia managed to seize one of the handguns belonging to [[Ulysses Klaue]]'s men when they started to attack during the sale of the [[Vibranium]] weapon at the [[Jagalchi Market Casino]]. She used the gun to return fire on Klaue's men before taking cover. *'''{{WPS|FN FAL}}''': Nakia took one of these weapons from the terrorist that held her captive during one of her missions, using it as a clubbing weapon to knock out some of the terrorists when they were attacked by [[T'Challa|Black Panther]]. *'''[[Sonic Rifle]]''': Nakia used the Sonic rifle to shoot two [[Talokanil]] to rescue [[Shuri]] and [[Riri Williams]]. ===Other Equipment=== *'''[[Kimoyo Beads]]''': Like many [[Wakanda]]ns, Nakia is equipped with Kimoyo Beads that can be used for various purposes. *'''[[Dora Milaje Armor]]:''' Despite not being a member of the Dora Milaje, Nakia wore the standard armor of the [[Wakanda]]n elite guard during the [[Battle of Mount Bashenga]]. Being made of [[Vibranium]] weaves, the armor offered high durability and protection to Nakia during her fight with a [[Heart-Shaped Herb]] empowered [[Erik Killmonger]]. ===Vehicles=== *'''[[Royal Talon Fighter]]''': Nakia was [[Rescue of Nakia|rescued]] by [[T'Challa]] from an undercover mission in [[Nigeria]] and transported in a [[Royal Talon Fighter]] alongside T'Challa and [[Okoye]], the latter as the pilot of the ship. While waiting to arrive in [[Wakanda]], she comforted T'Challa over his [[T'Chaka|father]]'s death. Later, When T'Challa decided to reveal Wakanda to the world and share their resources, Nakia was also transported in this ship to the [[Vienna International Centre]]. ==Relationships== {{Col-begin}}{{Col-2}} ===Family=== *[[Yaa]] - Mother *[[T'Challa II]] - Son ===Allies=== *[[River Tribe]] *[[Golden Tribe]] **[[T'Chaka]] † - Former King **[[Ramonda]] † - Former Queen **[[T'Challa|T'Challa/Black Panther]] † - Former King and Love Interest **[[Black Panther|Shuri/Black Panther]] - Princess and Close Friend *[[War Dogs]] *[[Tribal Council]] **[[M'Kathu]] **[[River Tribe Elder]] **[[Merchant Tribe Elder]] **[[Zawavari]] **[[Mining Tribe Elder]] *[[Dora Milaje]] **[[Ayo]] **[[Xoliswa]] † **[[Nomble]] **[[Yama]] *[[Midnight Angels]] **[[Okoye]] - Friend **[[Aneka]] *[[Zuri]] † *[[Border Tribe]] - Temporary Enemies *[[M20]] *[[Wakandan Royal Guard]] - Temporary Enemies *[[Sophia (Busan)|Sophia]] - Contact *[[CIA]] **[[Everett Ross]] - Savior *[[Jabari Tribe]] - Former Enemies **[[M'Baku]] *[[Griot]] *[[Ironheart|Riri Williams/Ironheart]] *[[Talokanil]] - Former Enemies **[[Namor]] **[[Attuma]] **[[Namora]] {{Col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[Ulysses Klaue]] † - Attempted Killer *[[Dave (Henchman)|Dave]] *[[Erik Killmonger|N'Jadaka/Erik Killmonger]] † - Attempted Killer *[[W'Kabi]] - Former Ally *[[List of Minor Characters/Phase Four#Black Panther: Wakanda Forever|Talokanil Guard]] † - Victim {{Col-end}} ==Appearances== In chronological order: *{{Appearance|BP}} **{{Appearance|BPAN}} **{{Appearance|MDCCBP}} *{{Appearance|TWFATEotAaB}} (mentioned) *{{Appearance|CMWMAH}} *{{Appearance|BPWF}} **{{Appearance|BPWFTS}} ==Trivia== *In the comics, Nakia was rescued by [[Erik Killmonger]] and then became his ally, taking the alias of '''Malice'''. ==Behind the Scenes== *[[Maria Hippolyte]], [[Niahlah Hope]] and [[Brionna Maria Lynch]] were stunt doubles for [[Lupita Nyong'o]] in the role of Nakia. *[[Lupita Nyong'o]] called Nakia a "''departure''" from her comic counterpart, calling her a "''war dog ... an undercover spy for [[Wakanda]]. Her job is to go out into the world and report back on what’s going on.''"[https://ew.com/movies/2017/07/12/black-panther-godfather-007-wakanda-royal-portrait/ ''Black Panther'' aims to be the superhero version of ''The Godfather'' and ''007''] *According to [[Ryan Coogler]] in the film's audio commentary, Nakia was heavily inspired by abolitionist and political leader {{WPS|Harriet Tubman}}, who served as a spy and agitator during the {{WPS|American Civil War}}. [[File:A-Force concept art.jpg|right|250px|Nakia (fourth from left) fighting in the [[Battle of Earth]]]] *Nakia was intended to fight in the [[Battle of Earth]] in ''[[Avengers: Endgame]]'', as she is shown in concept art for the scene. However, she was not included, presumably because [[Lupita Nyong'o]] had scheduling conflicts with other projects. ==References== {{Gallery|Nakia/Gallery}} {{Wq|Nakia}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel}} *{{WP|Nakia (comics)|Nakia}} *{{Marvel.com|characters/nakia}} [[es:Nakia]] [[fr:Nakia]] [[pt-br:Nakia]] [[ru:Накия]] [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Black Panther (film) Characters]] [[Category:Black Panther: Wakanda Forever Characters]] [[Category:Legends Characters]] [[Category:Book Characters]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Black Hair]] [[Category:Red Hair]] [[Category:Brown Eyes]] [[Category:War Dogs Members]] [[Category:River Tribe Members]] [[Category:Wakandan International Outreach Centre Employees]] [[Category:Multilingual Characters]]
